row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight road with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Static objects (parking structures, parked cars) remain stationary; ego vehicle trajectory indicated by red/blue lines shows forward progression.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, parking garage on left, industrial buildings on right, overcast sky. Road markings and curbs are clearly visible.
key_objects: blue parking sign near garage entrance
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are sharp and well-defined. No occlusions or ambiguities in object identification.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward camera movement consistent with vehicle driving. Objects maintain relative positions without sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Parked vehicles, signs, and buildings remain continuously visible throughout frames. No ghosting or flickering observed.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and overhead power lines show stable perspective changes consistent with forward motion.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle moves forward steadily along the road, maintaining lane position.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Pedestrian visible on far right sidewalk but not entering roadway. Traffic appears light.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout as Row 1, but with noticeable blurring and distortion artifacts. Some structural details appear smeared or misaligned.
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant loss of detail due to generation artifacts. Many objects lack clear boundaries. Colors appear desaturated compared to Row 1.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion present but accompanied by temporal instability — some objects exhibit slight warping or shifting between frames. Motion blur is inconsistent across scene depth.
logical.object_continuity: Most major objects persist across frames, but their shapes and positions show minor inconsistencies (e.g., car wheels appear slightly rotated or displaced).
logical.structure_continuity: Building lines and road edges show subtle undulations and misalignments, suggesting imperfect spatial coherence during generation.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward, though perceived speed may be altered by visual distortions.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene clarity may impair hazard detection. Pedestrian location less certain. Road boundary definition weakened, potentially affecting lateral control interpretation.

artifacts_or_instabilities: slight positional jitter in distant objects
